title: Minecraft's Dungeon Meshi
description: A mod recreating the anime: Dungeon Meshi. Includes the dungeons, new mobs, and new blocks.
body: **Minecraft's Dungeon Meshi Mod** is a mod based on the show _Dungeon Meshi_ or _Delicious in Dungeon_. It adds most of the monsters shown on the first floor of the dungeon and an infinitely generating structure in a custom dimension, which you can find a portal to the second floor. (This mod is still a work in progress, meaning some features may not work properly)
